case_title: CARLOS H. CASTILLO VS. RICARDO MOREIRA et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-30-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. Z9506).

DEFENDANT RICARDO MOREIRA NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
